title: [The Bee's Knees]
description: Potted flowers crafted from vellum and silk trace the periphery of the jadewood-planked floor, the wide terracotta vessels vibrant against the sky blue linens draped across the wooden framework.  A gilded honeyed oak beehive stands perched upon a counter of leaf-etched faenor, the wares highlighted by the tiny bee-shaped lanterns suspended across the beams.
